subject: refactor(theme): migrate MergeReview and DuplicateScanner to Tailwind
body:
Convert MergeReview, MergeSection, DuplicateScannerModal, and
DuplicatePairCard from custom CSS to Tailwind utility classes.
Delete ~740 lines of CSS. Both CSS files reduced to single-line
comments.
